title: Upcoming badge
summary: Upcoming Badge is a widget for Mac OS X Dashboard. Use it to view your Upcoming.org events watch list using Dashboard. Simply enter your username on the flip side of the widget. Links www.gingerbeardman.com/upcoming/
content:
Upcoming Badge is a widget for Mac OS X Dashboard.

Use it to view your Upcoming.org events watch list using Dashboard.

Simply enter your username on the flip side of the widget.

Links

  • www.gingerbeardman.com/upcoming/
